'''Graith''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Goroth Prime/Legends|Goroth Prime]]. It was the largest and most populous of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[o'beki]]s. It was also the seat of the [[P'Dar'Ken]] and the [[Colonial Government]], as well as the location of the corporate headquarters for the various rights holders allowed to operate on Goroth Prime.
